title: Coach can log in and reach dashboard
description: Verifies that a coach can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Coach can log out and protected pages remain inaccessible
description: Verifies that logging out redirects to the login page and navigating to a protected route after logout redirects back to login.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Coach sees Turkish error for invalid credentials
description: Verifies that a coach entering incorrect credentials sees an inline Turkish credential error and is not logged in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Verify an inline Turkish login error is displayed

title: Coach cannot submit empty login form
description: Verifies that submitting the login form without credentials is blocked by required-field validation and the user remains on the login page.

steps.description: Verify required-field validation is shown for the email and password fields

title: Login rejects empty credentials with Turkish validation
description: Verifies that submitting the login form with empty required fields shows Turkish validation errors and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Verify required-field validation errors are visible in Turkish

title: Login rejects invalid credentials with user-friendly Turkish error
description: Verifies that entering invalid credentials on the login form shows a user-friendly Turkish error and the user remains on the login experience.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password-123
Verify a login failure message is visible in Turkish

title: Generate AI workout program and preview multi-day plan
description: A coach can generate an AI workout program from the Programlar tab and sees a rendered multi-day plan preview after the loading state completes.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Start AI generation for the workout program
Verify a loading indicator for program generation is shown
Verify a workout program preview is displayed with multiple day cards

title: Send a message in an existing conversation
description: Verifies that a coach can send a message in a conversation and the new message appears in the chat history.

steps.description: Click the link to open Messages
Select a conversation from the conversation list
Fill "Otomasyon test mesajı" into the message input field
Verify the newly sent message appears in the chat history

title: Load students list and open a student detail
description: Verifies a coach can load the students list from the dashboard, see list content after loading state, and open a student detail successfully.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Click the first student in the list
Verify the student detail page is displayed

title: Dashboard shows KPIs and recent purchases list
description: Verifies that the dashboard loads and displays KPI cards and a recent purchases section for the logged-in coach.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a recent purchases list is displayed

title: Create first workout draft tab from program generation
description: A coach can create a first workout draft in Programlar and sees the first draft tab appear.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Verify a first draft tab is visible in the drafts area

title: Open conversation list
description: Verifies that a logged-in coach can open Messages and see a populated conversation list.

steps.description: Click the link to open Messages
Verify the conversation list is displayed with at least one conversation item

title: Search students by query
description: Verifies a coach can search the students list and see the displayed list update to match the query.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Fill a short query into the search field
Verify the visible student list updates to match the search query

title: Open a conversation thread
description: Verifies that selecting a conversation opens the chat panel with message history visible.

steps.description: Click the link to open Messages
Select a conversation from the conversation list
Verify the chat panel opens and message history is displayed

title: Coach can navigate from dashboard to students list
description: Verifies that a logged-in coach can navigate from the dashboard to the students list via in-app navigation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation item to open the students list
Verify the students list page is displayed

title: Navigate across all student detail tabs
description: Verifies a coach can open each of the four student detail tabs and each tab renders its corresponding content.
category: Student Detail Tabs (Genel Bakış, Programlar, Öğün Fotoğrafları, Form Analizi)

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Click the first student in the list
Verify the currently selected tab displays its corresponding section content

title: AI generation shows and clears loading state
description: A coach sees a visible loading state while AI generation runs and it disappears once the program preview is ready.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Start AI generation for the workout program
Verify a program generation loading state is visible
Verify the loading state is no longer visible and the program preview is displayed

title: Filter students to Active tab
description: Verifies a coach can switch to the Active students tab and see the list update to that filter.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Click the tab for active students
Verify the students list reflects the active filter state

title: Form analysis tab shows four-angle photos
description: Verifies that a coach can open a student’s Form Analizi tab and see front/back/left/right photos present.

steps.description: Click the link to open Students
Select a student from the list
Verify front, back, left, and right form photos are present

title: Generate program preview displays expected day count range
description: A coach can generate a program and the preview renders a valid plan structure showing 4–5 day cards.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Start AI generation for the workout program
Verify the generated program preview is displayed
Verify the preview shows multiple day cards consistent with a 4–5 day plan

title: Edit bio and social links and save
description: Verifies that a coach can update bio and social links on My Profile and the changes are reflected after saving.

steps.description: Click the link to open My Profile
Fill "Test bio güncellemesi" into the bio field
Fill "https://example.com/test" into a social link field
Verify the updated profile information is reflected on the page

title: Filter students to New purchases in last 7 days tab
description: Verifies a coach can switch to the New (7 days) tab and see the list update to recent purchases.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Click the tab for new purchases in the last 7 days
Verify the students list reflects the recent purchases filter state

title: Create second workout draft tab
description: A coach can generate a second workout draft and sees an additional draft tab appear without losing the first.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Verify at least two draft tabs are visible

title: Student detail shows exactly four tabs and no Messages tab
description: Verifies the student detail tab bar contains only the four intended tabs and does not include a Messages tab.
category: Student Detail Tabs (Genel Bakış, Programlar, Öğün Fotoğrafları, Form Analizi)

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Click the first student in the list
Verify the tab bar shows Genel Bakış, Programlar, Öğün Fotoğrafları, and Form Analizi and does not show a Mesajlar tab

title: View meal photos in a grid
description: A coach can open Öğün Fotoğrafları and sees meal photos displayed in a grid for the selected student.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Verify meal photos are displayed in a grid

title: Enlarge a form photo in modal viewer
description: Verifies that opening a form photo from Form Analizi shows the photo enlarged in a modal viewer.

steps.description: Click the link to open Students
Select a student from the list
Verify an enlarged photo viewer modal is displayed

title: View current profile information
description: Verifies that a logged-in coach can open My Profile and see current profile information loaded.

steps.description: Click the link to open My Profile

title: Genel Bakış renders onboarding values in Turkish and omits removed fields
description: Verifies the student overview renders onboarding labels/values localized to Turkish and does not show the removed Diz ağrısı or Supplement kullanımı fields.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Click the first student in the list
Verify onboarding labels and values are displayed in Turkish and the removed fields are not displayed

title: Create third workout draft tab
description: A coach can generate a third workout draft and sees three draft tabs available for the student.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Verify three draft tabs are visible

title: Turkish diacritics render correctly on the login page
description: Verifies Turkish diacritics render correctly on the login page labels and UI text.

steps.description: Verify Turkish diacritics (ç, ş, ğ, ü, ö, ı, İ) render correctly on visible labels and UI text

title: No online/offline status pill in Messages UI
description: Verifies that the Messages conversation list and chat UI do not render any online/offline status indicator.

steps.description: Click the link to open Messages
Select a conversation from the conversation list
Verify there is no online/offline status pill or status label shown for the selected conversation

title: Clear search restores full list within current tab
description: Verifies clearing the search input returns the student list to the unfiltered state for the currently selected tab.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Fill a short query into the search field
Verify the full unfiltered students list is shown for the current tab

title: Open a meal photo in enlarged viewer
description: A coach can open a meal photo from the grid and see an enlarged photo viewer or modal.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Click a meal photo from the grid
Verify an enlarged meal photo viewer is displayed

title: Copy referral code
description: Verifies that a coach can copy the referral code from My Profile and receives a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click the link to open My Profile
Click the control to copy the referral code
Verify a copy confirmation is visible

title: Search persists while switching tabs
description: Verifies a coach can enter a search query and switch tabs while keeping the list constrained by the query.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Fill a short query into the search field
Click the tab for active students
Verify the visible student list remains filtered by the search query

title: Enforce three-draft limit by blocking a fourth draft
description: A coach cannot create a fourth workout draft and the UI does not show a fourth draft tab after attempting to generate it.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Click a student from the list
Attempt to generate a fourth workout draft
Verify no additional draft tab beyond the existing three is visible

title: Preferred training days are displayed as Turkish day names joined together
description: Verifies the preferred training days field shows Turkish day names combined in a single readable list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Students
Wait for the students list to finish loading
Click the first student in the list
Verify preferred training days are shown as Turkish day names joined with commas
